news.headline: Lebanese family launches mobile aid initiative for displaced
news.summary: A Lebanese family in Beirut has launched a mobile aid initiative to support people displaced by the ongoing conflict.

news.headline: Ukraine strikes Russian Baltic port, hundreds of drones shot down
news.summary:

news.headline: Quieter, stealthier, further: new hybrid unit to power China’s small battle drones
news.summary:
A hybrid propulsion system designed to make small battlefield drones stealthier and go further has passed its flight tests, according to Chinese state media.

news.headline: Unidentified drones crash in Finland
news.summary: Two unidentified drones crashed in southern Finland on Sunday, an incident the defence ministry described as a "suspected territorial violation". Neighbouring countries Estonia, Lithuania and Latvia experienced similar crashes by drones on their land earlier this week.
